description: Well-established scientific fact should return authoritative sources
claim: The Earth orbits the Sun at an average distance of 93 million miles.

description: Health claim should return medical/scientific sources
claim: Vitamin C supplements can prevent the common cold.

description: Statistical claim should return sources with data
claim: Approximately 70% of the Earth's surface is covered by water.

description: Historical fact should return historical/educational sources
claim: World War II ended in 1945 with Japan's surrender.

description: Common myth should return debunking sources
claim: The Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye.

description: Recent scientific topic should return news/scientific sources
claim: COVID-19 was first identified in Wuhan, China in December 2019.

description: Scientific constant should return physics/science sources
claim: The speed of light in a vacuum is approximately 299,792 kilometers per second.

description: Nutrition claim should return health/nutrition sources
Technology claim should return tech/business sources
claim: The first iPhone was released by Apple in 2007.

description: Environmental claim should return scientific/news sources
claim: The Amazon rainforest produces about 20% of the world's oxygen.
